hero.title: Mine Gonka on
hero.subtitle: Rent enterprise-grade GPUs to mine cryptocurrency on our network with clear billing and predictable operations. For operators and pools who care about node stability, transparent payment terms, and scaling without surprises.

panel.description: Statuses are visible in one place, risks are highlighted in advance, and payment/renewal terms and responsibilities are fixed upfront.

opaque.title: Commercial uncertainty:
opaque.description: clear request flow, quote confirmation, and billing history.

features.title: Mining infrastructure that reduces your risk
features.subtitle: We handle the infrastructure so you can focus on earning. Clear request flow, predictable operations, and accountable uptime.

items.title: Dedicated GPUs with SLA
items.description: Enterprise-grade GPUs with accountable uptime guarantees. Your infrastructure reliability is our responsibility, with compensation if breached.

items.title: Managed Service
items.description: Installation and updates of Gonka software, 24/7 monitoring, and dashboards. We handle the technical complexity so you can focus on earning.

features.slaFootnote: * SLA applies to infrastructure availability only: network-level downtime, missed rewards, or any "mining/participation" outcomes are not covered.

forWho.title: Built for serious operators
forWho.subtitle: Whether you're running a large-scale operation or managing pools, we've built the infrastructure to match your needs.

operators.title: For Large-Scale Operators
operators.description: Enterprise-ready infrastructure for serious mining operations.

points: Faster incident response with clear updates

howItWorks.title: From request to mining in 7 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: We handle the infrastructure while you focus on earning tokens. Month-to-month and longer commitment options are available.

steps.title: Submit Request
steps.description: Choose your GPU model, preferred region, and contract duration. We'll check availability and prepare your quote.

steps.title: Complete KYC
steps.description: After KYC verification is done. We provide a clear checklist of required documentation to streamline the process.

steps.title: Review Quote
steps.description: Review your configuration, availability, region, contract duration, and commercial terms.

steps.title: Sign & Pay
steps.description: Sign the agreed contract and pay the first invoice upfront. Payment is required before server assignment.

steps.title: Provisioning
steps.description: We handle server assignment, software installation, and wallet connection. Provisioning completes within days.

steps.title: Operate & Monitor
steps.description: Your GPUs start mining. We provide 24/7 infrastructure monitoring and respond to any issues automatically.

steps.title: Billing & Renewal
steps.description: Invoices and renewal terms follow the agreed contract. Downtime credits are applied according to contract terms. Adjustments are handled according to the contract.

howItWorks.note: Infrastructure downtime credits apply to infrastructure issues only and do not cover missed network rewards.

managedServices.dashboardCaption: Monitor node state, GPU temperatures, utilization, and memory across your entire cluster in real-time

pricing.title: Choose your 8x GPU server type
pricing.subtitle: We offer 8x GPU servers based on H100, H200, B200, and B300 GPUs. Availability, region, contract duration, and commercial terms are confirmed after request. Month-to-month and longer commitment options are available.

gpuDescriptions.H100: Next-gen GPU server for high-performance workloads
gpuDescriptions.H200: High-memory GPU server for demanding workloads
gpuDescriptions.B200: Blackwell GPU server for advanced workloads
gpuDescriptions.B300: Newest Blackwell Ultra GPU server option

efficiency.title: Compare GPU efficiency
efficiency.subtitle: Higher efficiency means more weight per dollar spent. Choose the GPU that maximizes your return.
efficiency.formulaHint: Higher efficiency = more weight per dollar spent
efficiency.disclaimer: Weights are based on current network data and may vary. Efficiency calculations use listed hourly rates.

items.question: How quickly can I start participating?
items.answer: Provisioning typically completes within days after KYC verification and contract signing. With Managed Service, we handle server assignment, software installation, and wallet connection end-to-end.

items.question: Can I confirm infrastructure fit before committing budget?
items.answer: Yes. You can confirm availability, configuration, region, contract duration, and commercial terms before payment. We provide a clear checklist of required documentation to streamline the process.

items.question: What happens if servers are down?
items.answer: We have GPU Services SLA with clear, accountable uptime guarantees. Infrastructure-caused downtime receives credits applied to your next payment or refunded. Note: credits apply to infrastructure downtime only and do not cover missed network rewards.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: Billing terms depend on the agreed contract. We support month-to-month and longer commitment options. The first invoice must be paid before server assignment. Renewal, invoicing, and adjustments follow the contract terms.

items.question: Can I scale up or down?
items.answer: Scaling is available subject to capacity and contract terms. You can request additional servers or discuss changes to your current setup with our team.

items.question: What support is available?
items.answer: Business hours support for infrastructure issues (CET timezone). We provide 24/7 infrastructure monitoring with clear updates and next steps. Network software updates are applied within 24 hours of release.
